Blade Champion.name: Blade Champion
Blade Champion.equipped_with: A Blade Champion is equipped with: Vaultswords.

option_groups.header: Has acces to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Massive(1), Parry, Shield Host
Custodian armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Fighting style: During every activation, the Blade Champion may pick one of the following abilities for their Vaultswords:
1. Behemor - Armor piercing(5+)
2. Hurricanis - Flurry(2)
3. Victus - Precision(5+)
Martial superiority: The model can re-roll 1 to hit and 1 to wound roll.
• The unit can gain a Veteran ability.

Knight-Centura.name: Knight-Centura
Knight-Centura.equipped_with: A Knight-Centura is equipped with: Psyk-out grenade.

option_groups.header: Can swap the Flamer
Has acces to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Null-Maiden: The unit can never be targeted by psychic powers. Enemy psykers within 18" suffer a -1 penalty on any roll to manifest and dispel psychic powers. Enemy units within 12" suffer a -1 penalty to their Leadership. All ranged and melee attacks made by the unit against a target within 6" gain "Shield breaker(-1)".

Shield-Captain.name: Shield-Captain
Shield-Captain.equipped_with: A Shield-Captain is equipped with: Bolt caster; Guardian spear.

option_groups.header: Only one Shield-Captain per army.
Can replace the Guardian spear
A Shield-Captain with either a Guardian spear or a Castellan axe may get an Allarus terminator armor and Relic balistus grenade launcher for +33 points.
Has acces to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Massive(1), Shield Host

Battle Tactics: The Shield-Captain can assign two free Veteran abilities to himself and a friendly unit at the start of the deployment and replace both abilities during each Reinforcement phase. The friendly unit can be changed during each Reinforcement phase. All units must be able to gain the Veteran abilities. It does not count against the limit on how many Veteran abilities a unit can have.
Custodian armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Shield-Captain on Jetbike.name: Shield-Captain on Jetbike
Shield-Captain on Jetbike.equipped_with: A Shield-Captain on Jetbike is equipped with: Relic Interceptor lance; Lastrum bolt cannon.

option_groups.header: Only one Shield-Captain per army.
May swap the Lastrum bolt cannon

abilities: Shield Host

Battle Tactics: The Shield-Captain can assign two free Veteran abilities to himself and a friendly unit at the start of the deployment and replace both abilities during each Reinforcement phase. The friendly unit can be changed during each Reinforcement phase. All units must be able to gain the Veteran abilities. It does not count against the limit on how many Veteran abilities a unit can have.
Custodian armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Venerable Land Raider.name: Venerable Land Raider
Venerable Land Raider.equipped_with: A Land Raider is a single model and equipped with: 2 Twin lascannonn; Twin heavy bolter.

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with a Storm bolter for +13 points.
Can be equipped with a Multi-melter for +46 points.

abilities: Shield Host
Assault ramp: Passengers can still make a 6" charge move after the vehicle moves and they exit.
Custodes Atomantic Shielding: The model has a 5+ invulnerability save. Enemy attacks receive a -1 AT penalty (to a minimum of 1).
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 infantry models.

Rhino.name: Rhino
Rhino.equipped_with: A Rhino is equipped with: Storm bolter.

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with an additional Storm bolter for +11 points.

abilities: Fire hatches(2)

Null-Maiden: The unit can never be targeted by psychic powers. Enemy psykers within 18" suffer a -1 penalty on any roll to manifest and dispel psychic powers. Enemy units within 12" suffer a -1 penalty to their Leadership. All ranged and melee attacks made by the unit against a target within 6" gain "Shield breaker(-1)".
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 infantry models, excluding "Massive" models.

weapons.name: Balistus grenade launcher
weapons.abilities: Explosive, only for models in Terminator armor

weapons.name: Digital weapons
weapons.abilities: Extra attack, hits automatically wound the target.

equipment.name: Aquila Imperialis
equipment.desc: Instead of rolling for it, the model and the attached unit can automatically pass a Leadership test once per game.

equipment.name: Augury uplink
equipment.desc: The model and its attached may re-roll a single failed save per battle round.

equipment.name: Blade Imperator
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain "Frenzy(2")". Unique.

equipment.name: Castellan's mark
equipment.desc: After all units have been placed in the Deployment phase, remove and redeploy up to two of your units. Unique.

equipment.name: Gift of Terran Artifice
equipment.desc: The model gains "Decimate" for all weapons. Unique.

equipment.name: Impregnable mind
equipment.desc: This model can deny one psychic power per turn as if it were a Psyker.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic Skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ armor save.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model can reroll one hit roll with this weapon per round. Must be purchased separately for each weapon.

equipment.name: Panoptispex
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain "Seeking" for all ranged weapons. Unique.

equipment.name: Praesidius
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Stealth" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Praetorian plate
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Purity seal
equipment.desc: Enemy psykers suffer a -1 to manifestation rolls if they target the model or its attached unit directly.

equipment.name: Radiant mantle
equipment.desc: Enemy units suffer a cumulative -1 to their hit rolls against the model.

equipment.name: Storm shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry".

equipment.name: Superior Creation
equipment.desc:
Roll a die the first time the model is eliminated. 
1,2 - Remove the model.
3,4 - Set it back up with 1 wound.
5,6 - Set it up again with 2 wounds. Unique.

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Vault weapon
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Each improvement is unique per army.

equipment.name: Counter-attack
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Counter-attack".

equipment.name: Favoured enemy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Favoured enemy".

equipment.name: Furious charge
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Furious charge".

equipment.name: Infiltrator
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Infiltrator".

equipment.name: Outflank
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Outflank".

equipment.name: Tank hunter
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Tank hunter".

equipment.name: Terrain expert
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Move through cover" and "Use cover".

equipment.name: Vanguard
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Vanguard".

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Hunter-killer missile
equipment.desc: The model gains a Hunter-killer missile.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Magos-class machine spirit
equipment.desc: If the model is under the effect of "Crew shaken", it may fire one weapon at BS 2+.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

weapons.name: Admonimortis
weapons.abilities: AT(3), Slow(-1). Unique. Dread Host only.

weapons.name: Paragon Spear
weapons.abilities: AT(1), Quick(+1). Unique. Emperor's Chosen only.

equipment.name: Halo of the Torchbearer
equipment.desc: This model gains the "Magnificent Gleam" weapon. It and its attached unit gains the "Move Through Cover" ability. Unique. Emmissaries Imperatus only.

equipment.name: Praesidius
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Stealth" ability. Unique. Aquilan Shield only.

equipment.name: Stasis Oubliette
equipment.desc: Enemy units engaged with this model get -3 Initiative. Unique. Shadowkeepers only.

equipment.name: Swiftsilver Talon
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit gains the "Hit and Run" ability. Unique. Solar Watch only.

archetypes.name: Kataphraktoi
archetypes.desc:
- Jetbike Custodians can be taken as Troops.
- All units with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

archetypes.name: Tharanatoi
archetypes.desc:
- Allarus Custodians and Aquilon Custodians can be taken as Troops.
- Custodian Guard and Sisters of Silence become Elite choices.

legacies.name: Castellans of the Blessed Worlds
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Solar Watch Armory.

legacies.name: Gilded Guardians
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Aquilan Shield Armory.

legacies.name: Intruments of His Wrath
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Dread Host Armory.

legacies.name: The Hostless
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Emperor's Chosen Armory.

legacies.name: Warders of the Dark Cells
legacies.desc: The army has access to the Shadowkeepers Armory.
